---
title: "Hands On Exercise 1"
author: "Chua Wee Tian"
date: "April 10, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

# **Getting Started**

## **Install and Launch R Packages**

```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)
```

## **Import Data**

```{r}
exam_data <- read_csv("data/Exam_data.csv")
```

## **Simple Bar Chart**

```{r}
ggplot(data = exam_data, 
       aes(x = RACE)) +
    geom_bar()
```
